Astana Medical University, Kazakhstan

Established in 1997, Astana Medical University (AMU) is a government owned Nursring educational institution, located in Nur-Sultan, Kazakhstan. AMU is known for it's quality training and education in medicine and dentistry, pharmacy and nursing.

# Kazakhstan

Astana Medical University (AMU), Kazakhstan

Established in 1997, Astana Medical University (AMU) is a government owned Nursring educational institution, located in Nur-Sultan, Kazakhstan. AMU is known for it’s quality training and education in medicine and dentistry, pharmacy and nursing. The universitys focus is research, and it offers a wide variety of programs including undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral studies. Other than that, AMU is affordable for international students which makes it one of the popular medical universities for MBBS abroad. The welcoming atmosphere coupled with plenty of extracurricular activities and clubs foster a healthy environment towards learning for students from various countries.

The university is known for its alumni who have become skilled healthcare professionals and the AMU graduates are famous around the globe with a great number of them in exceling variety of medical disciplines. The university has also modernized the accommodation facilities for its students by providing them with comfortable hostels that are well furnished. Students can take advantage of clinical practice in the renowned hospitals and clinics. Undoubtedly, AMU is a good option in case you want to study medicine because of the friendly environment and low tuition fees.

Why Choose Astana Medical University (AMU), Kazakhstan?

For students who wish to position themselves for a medical career, AMU offers a flexible environment of quality education, affordable fees, and a diverse learning atmosphere.

Up-to-Date Education: The medical education at AMU is current and is offered by a well-qualified faculty.

Low Cost of Attendance: The university’s fee structure as well as the accommodation expenses is relatively low, which is beneficial for overseas students.

Cultural Network: AMU brings together students from different nations which adds to the cultural input in learning.

Non-Academic Activities: The university encourages students to participate in student self-government, artistic circles, and sports sections.

Comfortable Living Conditions: AMU’s hostels are spacious and fully furnished with all the needed facilities.

Scientific Investigation: AMU specializes in medical research which encourages students to take part in advanced studies.

Practical Work: Students acquire practical skills at affiliated hospitals and clinics.

Global Acceptability: AMU graduates are able to work in any country around the world, thanks to the universal recognition of the medical degree.

Eligibility Criteria To Study At Astana Medical University (AMU), Kazakhstan

Meeting certain criteria is a must for students who wish to apply for a medical program at Astana Medical University. These criteria guarantee students’ academic and language competence relative to the demands of medical education.

Age:

Students must be 17years of age by the start of the academic year. This makes sure that students are old enough to handle challenges of the medical program.

NEET Exam:

Students from India must have passed the NEET (National Eligibility cum Entrance Test) exam with a qualifying score. Students must also have a qualifying score for NEET that is essential for all foreign universities including AMU. The score ensures that students possess the required medical knowledge to start studies.

English Proficiency:

Since the course is taught in English, students must show evidence of language competency. A TOEFL score of at least 60, or an IELTS score of no less than 5.5, will suffice. Both examinations test proficiency in reading, writing, listening, and speaking English.

These prerequisites guarantee that learners are ready educationally to participate actively at Astana Medical university.

Hostel Facilities At Astana Medical University (AMU), Kazakhstan

Astana Medical University ensures that students feel safe and comfortable by providing them with excellent hostel facilities which are equipped with every required amenity.

Location: The hostels are within the university’s premises which makes them easily accessible from classrooms, laboratories, and libraries.

Separate Rooms for Boys and Girls: The university offers accommodation to male and female separately for greater ease and comfort.

Room Amenities: Each room includes a bed, desk, chair, wardrobe, and private bathroom.

Common Areas: Relaxation and study common areas are available to students.

Facilities:

  • Reading Room: A calm place for quiet study and reading.
  • Dining Room: Place where students can take their meals.
  • Canteen: Provides inexpensive and healthful meals.
  • Auditorium: For events and student functions.

Generally, AMU hostel facilities aim to create a positive living environment and experience for their students.

Student life At Astana Medical University (AMU), Kazakhstan

The student activity at Astana Medical University is colorful, multifarious and brims with possibilities of self-improvement as well as for academic growth.

Multicultural Environment: Students arriving from every corner of the globe translates to AMU’s diverse and rich cultural environment. Such multi-ethnicity promotes reciprocal learning amongst students which change their outlook towards the world.

Extracurricular Activities: Besides classroom work, AMU has plenty of clubs and activities that aim to motivate students as well. Sports, music, arts or culture, there is something for everyone. Students can participate in clubs like basketball, volleyball, football, track and field, music, art, and theater.

Student Government: The university has several student organizations that represent student interests at different levels with an aim to ameliorate the conditions of learning at the university. These associations streamline the flow of events and try to make sure that students are participants in the running of the university.

Social and Community Service: AMU places an emphasis on social engineering and community service. There are a number of students capable of serving the local community through organized events or volunteer programs.

Events and Festivals: AMU conducts several events, festivals, and other activities throughout the year that aid students in having some leisure time as well as having some social interaction. For them, these events serve the purpose of having fun as well as making friends.

Student life at AMU with its mix of academic work, cultural activities, and non-classroom activities is both interesting and enjoyable.

Ranking of Astana Medical University (AMU), Kazakhstan

The following are the ranks for Astana Medical University (AMU), Kazakhstan:

Country Rank: 40th in Kazakhstan

World Rank: 7969th globally

Astana Medical University constantly maintains a good position in Kazakhstan ranking of medical schools because of the quality education and research that it offers. it may not rank at the very top globally, but, it is still in the reach in the country and in the field of medical education.

Advantages of Studying At Astana Medical University (AMU), Kazakhstan

Studying at Astana Medical University makes em a top choice for aspiring medical professionals, because of quality education and international recognition as well as a friendly surrounding.

High-Quality Education: AMU has a highly qualified teaching staff who provide solid medical education to the students in learning.

Affordable Fees: AMU is cheaper than other medical universities in the world, hence making it a desirable option for foreign students.

International Recognition: AMU’s medical degrees are one of the qualified ones in many countries like united states, Japan and Great Britain.

Multicultural Environment: AMU is a international medical university which helps students from different parts of the world to understand the global perspective of healthcare.

Extracurricular Activities: AMU fosters students’ personal development and combines it with academic learning through music, sports, arts, and other clubs and activities offered in the school.

Research Opportunities: AMU encourages students to engage in collaborative projects in the field and to gain valuable practical experience by placing a strong emphasis on medical research.

Clinical Practice: Students receive a full time, real-world experience through clinical rotations at partner hospitals which enhances their career opportunities.

Student Government: Various student bodies exist to advocate for students’ needs to help enhance their campus experience and provide a unique form of leadership to the students.

These are some of the many reasons why Astana Medical University is a great choice for students seeking to obtain a medical degree in a multicultural and friendly setting.

Placement At Astana Medical University (AMU), Kazakhstan

Astana Medical University (AMU) guarantees outstanding placement for its graduates; consequently, they enter the medical field with the best preparation possible.

Outstanding Clinical Skills: The combination of rigorous theory components and clinical practices at AMU enables the students to demonstrate excellent clinical skills, which employers demand.

Reputation: AMU enjoys high prestige among employers in Kazakhstan and abroad, as the university provides the labor market with competent medical specialists.

Partner Hospitals and Clinics: AMU works with a number of hospitals and clinics where students perform their clinical rotations. This gives students the necessary experience while they build their professional networks.

Global Career Opportunities: AMU’s recognition gives the graduates the opportunity to work as physicians in many countries, including the United States, the United Kingdom, and Canada.

It is all of these features combined that make graduates of AMU highly competent and prepared to take on challenges in the healthcare industry.

Education Loan for Indian Students

For Indian learners willing to study abroad, including Astana Medical University, education loans covering both their tuition fees and personal living expenses are available. This is how it works:

Amount of Loan: The borrower amount fluctuates with the type and level of education pursued by the student as well as any extra tuition fees like hostel accommodation, etc.

Eligibility: Your NEET score, the university’s invitation letterand your parents’ income, assets, and credit history was crucial for institutions lending the money to determine the amount of loan offered.

Documents Required:

  • Scorecard of NEET exam
  • Attested or Invitation letter from University
  • College or Guardian’s income and assets proof
  • And other documents sought by the bank.

Repayment terms: Flexible payment arrangements are a common feature of educational loans. Some financial institutions do offer a grace period before the repayment commences after graduation.

If you are looking to get assistance with funding, Atlas Mentor has counselors who will guide you through the loan application and help achieve your goals in studying medicine abroad.

FAQs On Astana Medical University (AMU), Kazakhstan

If you’re considering studying at Astana Medical University, here are some frequently asked questions that can help you understand more about the university, its programs, and the admission process.

What programs does Astana Medical University offer?

AMU offers a wide range of programs, including undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral courses in medicine, dentistry, pharmacy, and nursing.

What is the medium of instruction at AMU?

The medium of instruction at AMU is English, making it easier for international students to pursue their studies without any language barriers.

Is Astana Medical University recognized internationally?

Yes, AMU’s medical degree is recognized by various countries, including the United States, the United Kingdom, and Canada, which means graduates can pursue careers globally.

How much does it cost to study at AMU?

The tuition fee is approximately $5500 per year, with additional costs for hostel and mess fees. This makes AMU an affordable option for international students compared to many other medical universities.

What are the hostel facilities like at AMU?

AMU provides well-furnished hostels with separate rooms for boys and girls, along with common areas for socializing and studying. The hostels are located on campus, making it convenient for students to access classes and other facilities.

These FAQs offer a quick overview of Astana Medical University, but for more detailed information, it’s always best to reach out to the university or consult an expert.
